question_template: Assume the observer moves {distance_m} meters forward, then rotates {angle_deg} degrees to the {turn_dir}. Where is object '{object_id}' relative to the new heading?
answer_rule: Apply hypothetical egomotion; compute bearing from new pose to object; discretize direction.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
